text:
Market today: The mood for tech and chips is a bit mixed, but strong underlying demand for semiconductors, highlighted by SK Hynix, is the real driver. This suggests resilience despite some cooling in the "hot" group.

Your holdings: SOXL (-23.49%) and SPAL (-24.45%) need immediate attention. Both are leveraged ETFs well below their stops, and margin amplifies these sharp drops. PTNM (-15.25%) is a tiny, volatile spec.

Watch: Closely monitor SOXL and SPAL stops. Also, keep an eye on broader chip sector performance for potential entry points on quality names.

Bottom line: Aggressively manage risk on your leveraged positions; they are your biggest immediate threat.
plays: Respect your stops on leveraged ETFs: SOXL (194.71, stop 200) and SPAL (19, stop 21.38) are both below their stops.
Consider trimming SOXL and SPAL to reduce margin risk, given their significant losses and leveraged nature.
If looking to add chip exposure, AVGO is on watch (entry 401.09-400.69, stop 399.76) and is in a daily discount.
